name: glasstutor-demo
description: 明镜 GlassTutor — a glass-box, learner-steerable adaptive tutor. Instead of hiding the AI's estimate of what you know inside a server-side black box, GlassTutor exposes that knowledge model as the first screen: every skill's mastery, confidence and the evidence behind it are visible; every question explains 'why this one, now'; and the learner has a first-class right to correct the model (mark a careless slip, redirect the learning path). A real deterministic mastery engine (IRT-lite update + prerequisite-aware, uncertainty-driven item selection) recomputes the path, so the before/after value (redundant drills saved) is measured, not faked. Static frontend demo (mock SQL skill graph + mock questions, no backend/LLM/external API).
